```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's 'felony murder special circumstance' law is outdated and unjust.",
    "Life in prison without the possibility of parole for a crime not committed or intended is disproportionately served to black and Latinx communities in California.",
    "SB 300 allows for a sentence other than death or life without parole for individuals who did not kill anyone or intend for anyone to die.",
    "SB 300 restores judicial discretion to impose a sentence other than death or life without parole when deemed in the interest of justice.",
    "The law that punishes individuals for actions committed by others disproportionately impacts victims of domestic violence and sex trafficking."
  ]
}
```
